zh.lifeSummary: 當Gilla Comgaill O'Tuathai MacDonncuan於大約1055年出生在愛爾蘭迪 本 度布林時，他的父親King Donncuan MacDunlainge O'Toole27歲，母親Sadhb Ingen Mael Morda O'Domnaill24歲。他和Sadb Ingen Mael Morda Ní Domail至少有7個兒子。他去世於大約1119年在愛爾蘭庫迪 沃特福德聖 馬也斯 可隆梅爾享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gilla Comgaill O'Tuathai MacDonncuan于大约1055年出生在爱尔兰迪 本 度布林时，他的父亲King Donncuan MacDunlainge O'Toole27岁，母亲Sadhb Ingen Mael Morda O'Domnaill24岁。他和Sadb Ingen Mael Morda Ní Domail至少有7个儿子。他去世于大约1119年在爱尔兰庫迪 沃特福德聖 馬也斯 可隆梅爾享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gilla
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Priscilla  , associated chiefly with the Liverpudlian singer and TV personality  Cilla Black  (  b. 1943 ), whose real name is  Priscilla White .

en.lifeSummary: When Gilla Comgaill O'Tuathai MacDonncuan was born about 1055, in Diocese of Dublin, Ireland, his father, King Donncuan MacDunlainge O'Toole, was 27 and his mother, Sadhb Ingen Mael Morda O'Domnaill, was 24. He had at least 7 sons with Sadb Ingen Mael Morda Ní Domail. He died about 1119, in St. Mary's Clonmel, County Waterford, Ireland, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gilla Comgaill O'Tuathai MacDonncuan est né environ 1055, à Diocese of Dublin, Irlande, son père, King Donncuan MacDunlainge O'Toole, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Sadhb Ingen Mael Morda O'Domnaill, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 7 fils avec Sadb Ingen Mael Morda Ní Domail. Il est décédé environ 1119, à St. Mary's Clonmel, County Waterford, Irlande, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.Glendalough, Waterford, Ireland: St. Mary's Clonmel, County Waterford, Irland
de.lifeSummary: Als Gilla Comgaill O'Tuathai MacDonncuan um 1055 in Diocese of Dublin, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater King Donncuan MacDunlainge O'Toole 27 und seine Mutter Sadhb Ingen Mael Morda O'Domnaill 24. Er hatte mit Sadb Ingen Mael Morda Ní Domail mindestens 7 Söhne. Er starb um 1119 im Alter von 66 Jahren in St. Mary's Clonmel, County Waterford, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gilla Comgaill O'Tuathai MacDonncuan è nato il circa 1055 nel Diocese of Dublin, Irlanda, il suo padre, King Donncuan MacDunlainge O'Toole, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Sadhb Ingen Mael Morda O'Domnaill, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 7 figli con Sadb Ingen Mael Morda Ní Domail. Morì circa 1119, nel St. Mary's Clonmel, County Waterford, Irlanda, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gilla Comgaill O'Tuathai MacDonncuanが約1055年にアイルランドディオセゼ オフ ダブリンで生まれた時，父King Donncuan MacDunlainge O'Tooleは27歳，母Sadhb Ingen Mael Morda O'Domnaillは24歳であった。彼はSadb Ingen Mael Morda Ní Domailとの間に少なくとも7人の息子をもうけた。彼は約1119年にアイルランドコウントイ ワテルフォードスト. マリ'ス クロンメルで66歳で死去した。

ko.Glendalough, Waterford, Ireland: 아일랜드 카운티 왓르퍼드 스트. 마이'스 클론멀
ko.lifeSummary: Gilla Comgaill O'Tuathai MacDonncuan(이)가 대략 1055년 아일랜드 디오스스 프 드블린에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 King Donncuan MacDunlainge O'Toole(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Sadhb Ingen Mael Morda O'Domnaill(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Sadb Ingen Mael Morda Ní Domail(와)과 적어도 일곱 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1119년 아일랜드 카운티 왓르퍼드 스트. 마이'스 클론멀에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gilla Comgaill O'Tuathai MacDonncuan nasceu aproximadamente 1055, em Diocese of Dublin, Irlanda, seu pai, King Donncuan MacDunlainge O'Toole, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Sadhb Ingen Mael Morda O'Domnaill, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 7 filhos com Sadb Ingen Mael Morda Ní Domail. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1119, em St. Mary's Clonmel, County Waterford, Irlanda, com 66 anos.

ru.Glendalough, Waterford, Ireland: ст. мэри'с клонмел, коунти вэитирфорд, Ирландия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gilla Comgaill O'Tuathai MacDonncuan родился около 1055 г. в местности диосес оф дублинь, Ирландия, его отцу по имени King Donncuan MacDunlainge O'Toole было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Sadhb Ingen Mael Morda O'Domnaill, 24. У него было по крайней мере 7 сыновей от Sadb Ingen Mael Morda Ní Domail. Он умер около 1119 г. в местности ст. мэри'с клонмел, коунти вэитирфорд, Ирландия в возрасте 66 лет.

Tuvo por lo menos 7 hijos con Sadb Ingen Mael Morda Ní Domail. Murió aproximadamente 1119, en St. Mary's Clonmel, County Waterford, Irlanda, a la edad de 66 años.
